shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!dist'"' -g '"'!build'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'package.json' -g 'next.config.*' -g 'src/**' -g 'app/**' -g 'pages/**' | head -200"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,200p' package.json && printf '\\n--- config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' tsconfig.json"
/bin/bash -lc "rg \"function revalidateTag|revalidateTag\\(\" node_modules/next/dist -g '*.d.ts' -g '*.ts' | head -40 && rg \"unstable_cache\" node_modules/next/dist/server -g '*.d.ts' | head -20"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- app/page.tsx app/layout.tsx app/globals.css lib/db.js tsconfig.json'
/bin/bash -lc 'curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | rg -o "Products|Sync latest catalog|Laptop|Acme Commerce" | sort | uniq -c'
